attacking_style: Does not attack traditionally but hunts intermediate sprints aggressively mid-race to accumulate GC bonus seconds, treating stage races as time-bonus opportunities rather than positioning battles.
team_tactics: Operates independently in intermediate sprint hunting, requiring minimal team support. Positioning focuses on being present at bonus sprint locations rather than controlling pace.
terrain_preference: Excels on cobbled classics (maintained Sagan's rhythm through final 20km Paris-Roubaix); track cycling background suggests flat power sections suit him. Intermediate sprint locations are primary tactical targets.
vulnerability: Final sprint execution disappointing relative to track cycling pedigree (failed to capitalize on velodrome finish at Roubaix). Appears to prioritize bonus hunting over stage wins even when positioned well.
key_patterns: Hunts intermediate sprint bonuses for GC time rather than stage positioning (3 observations)
Replicates successful GC strategies year-over-year, targeting 10th overall finishes (2 observations)
Strong cobbled terrain ability, maintaining top rider's pace through technical sections (2 observations)
Track cycling background underutilized in final sprints despite technical capability (2 observations)
form_trajectory: neutral: Consistently executing same intermediate sprint bonus strategy across 2018 season without evolution or breakthrough results
